mapper.sql: SELECT id, session_id, seq, role, content, content_type, created_at, meta FROM skill_message
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM skill_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(seq), 0) FROM skill_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_message (session_id, seq, role, content, content_type, created_at, meta) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{seq}, #{role}, #{content}, #{contentType}, NOW(), #{meta})
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_message SET tokens_in = COALESCE(#{tokensIn}, tokens_in), tokens_out = COALESCE(#{tokensOut}, tokens_out), cost = COALESCE(#{cost}, cost) WHERE id = #{id}
